items.description: Array of state items to cycle through. Each item has value, label, and optional icon

value.description: Current value of the checkbox (controlled component)

onChange.description: Change event handler. Receives event object with value, name, and args properties

required.description: Mark the hidden input as required for form validation

id.description: HTML id attribute for the button element

name.description: Name attribute for the hidden input (used in forms)

args.description: Additional arguments passed to onChange handler

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container
